rows.description: Soluta varia
rows.notes: Consensus reached. This is a clear page title/header.

rows.description: Accᵗ Diner
rows.notes: Visually confirmed amount 03 00 00 in the columns. Although it acts as a sub-header, the presence of a monetary amount classifies it as an 'entry'. gpt-5-mini was correct on amounts and row_type, gemini-flash misidentified as header without amounts.
rows.english_description: Account for dinners.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account for dinners, amounting to £3 0s 0d.
